case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. PAVLE JOVANOVIC et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: COMPLIANCE WITH CCP SECTION 1033 (B) (2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
